content.fact_text: Implemented a production-ready BackgroundWorkerOrchestrator for managing asynchronous inventory and cache tasks.

provenance_data.behaviour: Initializes a background worker orchestrator that consumes from Kafka, processes tasks using registered handlers with retry logic and circuit breaking, and manages service lifecycle.
provenance_data.utility: Provides a resilient, production-grade infrastructure component for executing background tasks (reconciliation/invalidation) in a distributed Kafka/Redis architecture.
